definition:
A man living at the time of Divided Monarchy, only mentioned at Zep.1.1; 
 son of: Amariah (H0568O); 
 father of: Cushi (H3569H)
 § Gedaliah = "Jehovah is great"
1) a son of Jeduthun in the time of David
2) governor of Judea
3) son of Pashur, one of the chiefs of Jerusalem in the time of Jeremiah
